hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'git commit' && cd "c:/Users/qingwen/.gemini/antigravity/workspaces/土窟設計su渲染插件" && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "vercel --prod" 2>&1 | tail -4 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ".\build_rbz.ps1" 2>&1 | tail -3 || exit 0
hooks.statusMessage: 🚀 偵測到 commit，自動部署中...
